src/main/java/de/muenchen/rbs/kitafinder.general_idea: Remove the CommandLineRunner implementation and associated exit code logic to simplify the application entry point.
src/main/java/de/muenchen/rbs/kitafinder.human_impl: Removed implements CommandLineRunner, the run() method, and the inner ExitException class.

src/main/java/de/muenchen/rbs/kitafinder.general_idea: Remove explicit component scan configuration as it is redundant with the default behavior of @SpringBootApplication.
Remove unused imports related to the removed CommandLineRunner and ComponentScan features.
src/main/java/de/muenchen/rbs/kitafinder.human_impl: Removed imports for CommandLineRunner, ExitCodeGenerator, and ComponentScan.

src/main/java/de/muenchen/rbs/kitafinder.general_idea: Replace javax.validation imports with jakarta.validation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3 on Java 21.
Replace manual JSON deserialization with injected services (KitaFinderService, ModelMapper, Validator, AuditService) to implement actual business logic.
Add Spring Security annotations to enforce role-based access control and API client authentication.
Enable Cross-Origin Resource Sharing for the controller to allow browser-based clients.
Update OpenAPI/Swagger annotations to reflect new security requirements, response codes, and operation details.
Implement server-side validation of the response object using the injected Validator before returning it.
Integrate audit service to log request/response metadata for compliance and tracking.
Extract path variable name into a static constant for maintainability.
Corrected a typo in the comment mapping the Java field to the database column name.
Updated the API schema description to reflect that the parents list is now calculated from SB1 and SB2 only, excluding ABW.
src/main/java/de/muenchen/rbs/kitafinder.human_impl: Changed description from 'SB1, SB2 und ABW' to 'SB1 und SB2'

src/main/java/de/muenchen/rbs/kitafinder.general_idea: The Javadoc comment for the class was truncated or modified.
src/main/java/de/muenchen/rbs/kitafinder.human_impl: Changed comment from 'Adresse des Kindes...' to 'Adress'

src/main/java/de/muenchen/rbs/kitafinder.general_idea: Add @Valid annotation to enable recursive validation of the nested children collection.
Initialize the children collection with an empty ArrayList to prevent null pointer exceptions.
Import ArrayList class to support the initialization of the children field.
Import Valid annotation class to support the validation of the children field.
Corrected the spelling of the field name from 'intituteName' to 'instituteName' to match the semantic meaning and likely external data contracts.
src/main/java/de/muenchen/rbs/kitafinder.human_impl: private String intituteName; -> private String instituteName;

src/main/java/de/muenchen/rbs/kitafinder.general_idea: Added @Valid annotation to the groups collection to ensure nested objects are validated recursively.
Change the visibility of the nested enum ParentType from package-private to public.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.5.5 to align with Java 21 ecosystem and receive security patches.
Configure Maven compiler source and target to Java 21.
Add Spring Security starter dependency to enable authentication and authorization features.
Add OAuth2 Resource Server starter to support JWT validation and protected resource endpoints.
Add PostgreSQL JDBC driver dependency for database connectivity.
Add Flyway PostgreSQL database plugin to support schema migrations for PostgreSQL.
Add ModelMapper dependency to facilitate object-to-object mapping.
Add Bean Validation API dependency to support input validation annotations.
Add Hibernate Validator implementation for Bean Validation API.
Add Logstash Logback Encoder to format logs for structured logging pipelines.
Add Spring Security Test dependency to support testing secured endpoints.

.github/workflows/build.yaml.general_idea: Update actions/checkout to v4 to support newer GitHub Actions features and security patches.
Update advanced-security/policy-as-code to v2.7.2 for latest policy definitions.
Add workflow_dispatch trigger to allow manual triggering with a version input for image tagging.
Define environment variables for Maven project root and build target to standardize paths.
Add a dedicated build job that sets up JDK 21 and runs Maven tests and install.
.github/workflows/build.yaml.human_impl: jobs: build: uses: actions/setup-java@v4 with: java-version: '21'

.github/workflows/build.yaml.general_idea: Upload build artifacts to allow downstream jobs to access the compiled application.
Add a job to build and push Docker images to GitHub Container Registry (GHCR).
Extract metadata and tags for Docker images, specifically supporting semver tagging from workflow inputs.
Authenticate with GitHub Container Registry to allow pushing images.
Set up QEMU and Docker Buildx for multi-platform image building support.
